action.reasoning: Observation: Best macro_f1=0.3789 with fine-tuned CLIP, but severe overfitting (95.4% train vs 61.9% val). Zero-shot ensemble slightly hurt. ~57 min remaining. Analysis: The overfitting is in the backbone adaptation - frozen CLIP features should generalize much better OOD. A linear probe on frozen CLIP features is fast to train (feature extraction ~5-10 min, linear head ~1 min) and should reduce the overfitting gap dramatically. Decision: Train linear probe on frozen CLIP features with class-balanced loss, then submit eval. If it beats 0.3789, great; if not, I still have time for another attempt.
